mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND user_pwd=#{userPwd} AND STATUS='Y'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO member VALUES( SEQ_UNO.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{userPwd}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{birthday}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{address}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
SELECT SEQ_UNO.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id, user_name FROM member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND STATUS='Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET USER_NAME = #{userName}, EMAIL = #{email}, BIRTHDAY = #{birthday}, GENDER = #{gender}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDRESS = #{address}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'Y'
